settings.heading: Finally, a chew that actually lasts.
settings.subheading: For dogs that destroy soft treats in minutes, Prime Pet Food Himalayan yak chews create a longer, more focused chewing routine.
settings.problem_heading: Your dog needs more than a quick snack.
settings.problem_text: Heavy chewers burn through soft treats fast, then go looking for shoes, furniture, and anything else that feels satisfying.
settings.solution_heading: A dense yak cheese chew gives them a better job.
settings.solution_text: Slow-dried Himalayan yak cheese creates a naturally hard chew made for longer supervised sessions and calmer energy.
settings.review_1: My power chewer finally slowed down. This lasted so much longer than his usual treats.
settings.review_2: Less mess, less odor, and my dog was focused for a full chew session.
settings.review_3: The first chew that felt worth it for my aggressive chewer.
settings.product_heading: Start with Prime Pet Food yak chews.
settings.product_text: A premium rawhide-free chew for dogs that need durability, enrichment, and a cleaner routine.
settings.bullet_1: Naturally hard for stronger chewing styles
settings.final_heading: Give your heavy chewer something worthy of the job.
settings.final_text: Upgrade from short-lived treats to focused chew time.
